'''鈭歽-v-h''' ('''kayavah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pooch|pooch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pooch|pooch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayavah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyavah|thiyavah]] || [[word:jiyavah|jiyavah]] || [[word:shiyavah|shiyavah]] || [[word:kiyavah|kiyavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyavah|thuthuyavah]] || [[word:jujuyavah|jujuyavah]] || [[word:shushuyavah|shushuyavah]] || [[word:kukuyavah|kukuyavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyavah|thuyavah]] || [[word:juyavah|juyavah]] || [[word:shuyavah|shuyavah]] || [[word:kuyavah|kuyavah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyavah|thuyavah]] || [[word:juyavah|juyavah]] || [[word:shuyavah|shuyavah]] || [[word:kuyavah|kuyavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyavah|theyavah]] || [[word:jeyavah|jeyavah]] || [[word:sheyavah|sheyavah]] || [[word:keyavah|keyavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyavah|thothoyavah]] || [[word:jojoyavah|jojoyavah]] || [[word:shoshoyavah|shoshoyavah]] || [[word:kokoyavah|kokoyavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyavah|thoyavah]] || [[word:joyavah|joyavah]] || [[word:shoyavah|shoyavah]] || [[word:koyavah|koyavah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyavah|thoyavah]] || [[word:joyavah|joyavah]] || [[word:shoyavah|shoyavah]] || [[word:koyavah|koyavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yavah|th忙yavah]] || [[word:j忙yavah|j忙yavah]] || [[word:sh忙yavah|sh忙yavah]] || [[word:k忙yavah|k忙yavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayavah|thathayavah]] || [[word:jajayavah|jajayavah]] || [[word:shashayavah|shashayavah]] || [[word:kakayavah|kakayavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayavah|thayavah]] || [[word:jayavah|jayavah]] || [[word:shayavah|shayavah]] || [[word:kayavah|kayavah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayavah|thayavah]] || [[word:jayavah|jayavah]] || [[word:shayavah|shayavah]] || [[word:kayavah|kayavah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayavah|shayavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayavah|goshayavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayavah|gokishayavah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayavahn眉|shayavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayavahnkn眉|goshayavahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavahn眉|gokishayavahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayavahsh毛|shayavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayavahnksh毛|goshayavahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayavahsh毛|gokishayavahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavahro|shayavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavahnkro|goshayavahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavahro|gokishayavahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavahmu|shayavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavahnkmu|goshayavahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavahmu|gokishayavahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayavahsher|shayavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayavahnksher|goshayavahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayavahsher|gokishayavahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayavahng|shayavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayavahnkng|goshayavahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayavahng|gokishayavahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayavahya|shayavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayavahnkya|goshayavahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayavahya|gokishayavahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayavahyam|shayavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayavahnkyam|goshayavahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayavahyam|gokishayavahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavahn眉sh毛|shayavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavahnkn眉sh毛|goshayavahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavahn眉sh毛|gokishayavahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavahn眉ro|shayavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavahnkn眉ro|goshayavahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavahn眉ro|gokishayavahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavahn眉mu|shayavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavahnkn眉mu|goshayavahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavahn眉mu|gokishayavahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavahsh毛n眉|shayavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavahnksh毛n眉|goshayavahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavahsh毛n眉|gokishayavahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavahsh毛ro|shayavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavahnksh毛ro|goshayavahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavahsh毛ro|gokishayavahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavahsh毛mu|shayavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavahnksh毛mu|goshayavahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavahsh毛mu|gokishayavahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavahron眉|shayavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavahnkron眉|goshayavahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavahron眉|gokishayavahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavahrosh毛|shayavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavahnkrosh毛|goshayavahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavahrosh毛|gokishayavahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavahromu|shayavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavahnkromu|goshayavahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavahromu|gokishayavahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavahmun眉|shayavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavahnkmun眉|goshayavahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavahmun眉|gokishayavahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavahmush毛|shayavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavahnkmush毛|goshayavahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavahmush毛|gokishayavahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavahmuro|shayavahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavahnkmuro|goshayavahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavahmuro|gokishayavahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
